sentence: 战士们在寒冷的冬天坚守边防，保卫国家。
pinyin: Zhàn shì men zài hán lěng de dōng tiān jiān shǒu biān fáng, bǎo wèi guó jiā.
english: The soldiers guard the frontier defense through the cold winter to protect the country.

sentence: 新的法律需要经过立法机关审议通过。
pinyin: Xīn de fǎ lǜ xū yào jīng guò lì fǎ jī guān shěn yì tōng guò.
english: New laws must be reviewed and passed by the legislature.

pinyin: Yángtái shàng bǎi le jǐ pén huāhuì.
english: A few pots of flowers and plants are arranged on the balcony.

sentence: 街上停着一辆警车，引来很多人围观。
pinyin: Jiē shang tíng zhe yī liàng jǐng chē, yǐn lái hěn duō rén wéiguān.
english: A police car was parked on the street, drawing a crowd of onlookers.

sentence: 他背着大包走了很远的路。
pinyin: Tā bèi zhe dà bāo zǒu le hěn yuǎn de lù.
english: He walked a long way carrying a large bag on his back.
